verse.name: v1
verse.lines: History is repeating But it's much greater now A greater than Ruth is uniting With her Kinsman Redeemer This is the harvest time We've seen the Lord of the harvest appear But to come into full union with Him This is my prayer

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This is my prayer This is my cry I want more of You No matter the price Total separation Lord Not my will but Thine Take me up those seven steps Till in Your image I stand Take me up those seven steps Till in Your image I stand

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Thresh the chaff around my life So I'll be a pure grain With no hidden sin deep within To hinder You from coming in All I want is You, my Lord So please empty me I pray 'Cause I know the more I empty out Is the more that You can fill

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: This is my prayer This is my cry I want more of You No matter the price Total separation Lord Not my will but Thine Take me up those seven steps Till in Your image I stand Take me up those seven steps Till in Your image I stand

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Wash me, anoint me Lord please take full control Separate my soul So I can be A true eagle Nazarite in this hour The new crop that has grown out With Your power

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: This is my prayer This is my cry I want more of You No matter the price Total separation Lord Not my will but thine Take me up those seven steps Till in Your image I stand Take me up those seven steps Till in Your image I stand

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: This is my prayer This is my cry I want more of You No matter the price Total separation Lord A true eagle Nazarite Give me faith and virtue Lord So in Your image I'll stand

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Knowledge and temperance Lord So in Your image I'll stand Godliness and patience Lord So in Your image I'll stand Give me brotherly kindness Lord So in Your image I'll stand Give me all Your love Lord So in Your image I'll stand
